title: Running Python Code
summary: Use the ZoeSkoul browser code editor, Run button, and output panel to execute Python code.

sketchBlocks.title: Introduction to Running Python Code
sketchBlocks.bodyMarkdown:
In this section, we will learn how to run Python code using the ZoeSkoul browser code editor. To start, you can type your code in the editor and click the 'Run' button to see the output in the output panel. 

**Example:**
```python
print('Hello, World!')
```
This code will display 'Hello, World!' in the output panel when you run it. 

**Your turn:** Try writing your own print statement!

sketchBlocks.title: Understanding Output
sketchBlocks.bodyMarkdown:
The output panel shows the results of your code execution. It's important to understand what your code is doing by observing the output. 

**Example:**
```python
print('The sum of 2 and 3 is', 2 + 3)
```
This will print 'The sum of 2 and 3 is 5'. 

**Try this:** Modify the numbers in the print statement to see different results!

quizDraft.title: What does the print function do?
options: It saves the code to a file.
It displays output on the screen.
It runs the code in the background.
quizDraft.hint: Think about what you see after running your code.

help.concept: The print function is used to display output to the user.
help.hint_1: Look for the answer that describes displaying information.
help.hint_2: Consider what happens when you run a print statement.

quizDraft.title: What will this code output? `print('Hello')`
quizDraft.hint: Think about what the print function outputs.

help.concept: The print function outputs exactly what is inside the parentheses.
help.hint_1: Consider if there are any extra characters in the output.
help.hint_2: Remember that the output matches the string exactly.

quizDraft.title: Which of the following are valid Python print statements?
quizDraft.hint: Look for statements that use correct syntax.

help.concept: Valid print statements must have correct syntax and use quotes for strings.
help.hint_1: Check if the text is enclosed in quotes.
help.hint_2: Consider how expressions can be printed.

quizDraft.title: What can you do in the ZoeSkoul code editor?
options: Check output in the output panel
quizDraft.hint: Think about the features available in the browser code runner.

help.concept: The ZoeSkoul code editor allows you to run code and see output.
help.hint_1: Consider what actions you can perform in the editor.
help.hint_2: Remember that saving files is not an option.
